subtitle.en: Free certificates that turn your site into a secure, padlocked HTTPS site
subtitle.zh: 免費憑證，讓你的網站變成有鎖頭的安全 HTTPS 網站

tagline.en: The padlock in the address bar — it encrypts traffic so nobody can read or tamper with it.
tagline.zh: 網址列上那把鎖頭 —— 把流量加密，沒人能偷看或竄改。

text.en: SSL/TLS is the technology that encrypts the connection between a visitor's browser and your website. It's what turns http:// into the secure https:// with a padlock icon.
text.zh: SSL/TLS 是一種把「訪客瀏覽器」與「你的網站」之間連線加密的技術。它就是把 http:// 升級成有鎖頭的安全 https:// 的關鍵。

text.en: TLS (Transport Layer Security) is the modern version; SSL is the older name people still use. To prove your site is really yours, it presents a certificate — a digital ID card signed by a trusted authority. Cloudflare issues these for free.
text.zh: TLS（Transport Layer Security，傳輸層安全協定）是現代版本；SSL 是大家還在沿用的舊名稱。為了證明這個網站真的是你的，網站會出示一張「憑證（certificate）」—— 等於一張由可信機構簽署的數位身分證。Cloudflare 免費幫你發。

text.en: Sending a sealed, tamper-proof envelope instead of a postcard. Without TLS, anyone handling the mail (your Wi-Fi, your ISP) can read everything; with it, only the recipient can open it.
text.zh: 用「密封、防拆的信封」取代「明信片」。沒有 TLS 時，任何經手郵件的人（你的 Wi-Fi、你的網路業者）都能看光內容；有了它，只有收件人打得開。

text.en: Encrypts passwords, payments, and personal data so eavesdroppers see only scrambled noise.
text.zh: 把密碼、付款、個人資料加密，竊聽者只看到一堆亂碼。

text.en: Browsers label http:// sites 'Not secure'. The padlock reassures visitors your site is legit.
text.zh: 瀏覽器會把 http:// 網站標成「不安全」。鎖頭讓訪客安心，知道你的站是正牌的。

text.en: Google ranks HTTPS sites higher than insecure ones.
text.zh: Google 會把 HTTPS 網站排在不安全網站前面。

text.en: Stops attackers injecting ads or malware into pages as they travel to the visitor.
text.zh: 阻止攻擊者在頁面傳送途中偷塞廣告或惡意程式。

text.en: There are two legs of the journey: visitor → Cloudflare, and Cloudflare → your origin server. The encryption mode controls how the second leg is secured. Cloudflare recommends Full (strict).
text.zh: 整段旅程分兩段：訪客 → Cloudflare，以及 Cloudflare → 你的來源伺服器（origin server，存放網站本體的主機）。加密模式決定第二段怎麼保護。Cloudflare 建議用 Full (strict)。

text.en: No encryption at all. Almost never appropriate — everything is sent as plain text.
text.zh: 完全不加密。幾乎沒有適用時機 —— 所有東西都用明文傳送。

text.en: Visitor→Cloudflare is encrypted, but Cloudflare→origin is not. A stopgap for origins that can't do HTTPS yet.
text.zh: 訪客→Cloudflare 有加密，但 Cloudflare→來源伺服器沒有。適合暫時還做不了 HTTPS 的來源主機過渡用。

text.en: Both legs encrypted, but the origin's certificate isn't validated. OK for self-signed certs.
text.zh: 兩段都加密，但不驗證來源伺服器的憑證。來源用自簽憑證時可用。

text.en: Both legs encrypted AND the origin certificate is validated. The recommended, most secure option.
text.zh: 兩段都加密，而且驗證來源憑證。最安全、官方建議的選項。

text.en: Once your site is on Cloudflare, a free Universal SSL certificate is issued automatically. These steps make sure every visitor uses HTTPS.
text.zh: 只要網站接上 Cloudflare，系統就會自動發一張免費的 Universal SSL 憑證。以下步驟確保每位訪客都走 HTTPS。

title.zh: 確認 Universal SSL 已啟用

text.en: Go to SSL/TLS → Edge Certificates. Your free certificate appears here automatically, usually within minutes of adding your domain.
text.zh: 進入 SSL/TLS → Edge Certificates（邊緣憑證）。你的免費憑證會自動出現在這裡，通常加入網域後幾分鐘內就好。

text.en: Go to SSL/TLS → Overview and choose Full (strict). Make sure your origin server has a valid certificate — Cloudflare offers a free Origin CA certificate for exactly this.
text.zh: 進入 SSL/TLS → Overview（總覽），選 Full (strict)。確認你的來源伺服器裝了有效憑證 —— Cloudflare 提供免費的 Origin CA 憑證就是為了這個。

text.en: Go to SSL/TLS → Edge Certificates and enable Always Use HTTPS. Any http:// visitor is instantly redirected to the secure https:// version.
text.zh: 進入 SSL/TLS → Edge Certificates，開啟 Always Use HTTPS（一律使用 HTTPS）。任何用 http:// 進來的訪客都會立刻被導向安全的 https:// 版本。

title.zh: 開啟自動 HTTPS 改寫

text.en: On the same page, switch on Automatic HTTPS Rewrites so old http:// links inside your pages are fixed on the fly, avoiding 'mixed content' warnings.
text.zh: 在同一頁開啟 Automatic HTTPS Rewrites（自動 HTTPS 改寫），讓頁面內舊的 http:// 連結即時被修正，避免出現「混合內容（mixed content）」警告。

title.zh: 拿一張免費的來源憑證

text.en: Under SSL/TLS → Origin Server, click Create Certificate to generate a free Cloudflare Origin CA cert (valid up to 15 years) and install it on your server — this is what makes Full (strict) work.
text.zh: 在 SSL/TLS → Origin Server（來源伺服器）點 Create Certificate，產生一張免費的 Cloudflare Origin CA 憑證（最長 15 年效期）裝到你的主機上 —— 這就是讓 Full (strict) 成立的關鍵。

text.en: A digital ID that proves your domain's identity and holds the keys used to encrypt traffic.
text.zh: 一張數位身分證，證明你網域的身分，並存放用來加密流量的金鑰。

text.en: Secures the visitor → Cloudflare leg. Universal SSL provides this for free, auto-renewed.
text.zh: 保護「訪客 → Cloudflare」那一段。Universal SSL 免費提供，自動續期。

text.en: Secures the Cloudflare → origin leg. Cloudflare's free Origin CA cert fills this role.
text.zh: 保護「Cloudflare → 來源伺服器」那一段。Cloudflare 免費的 Origin CA 憑證負責這塊。

text.en: Automatically issues certificates for every subdomain, so nothing is left unencrypted.
text.zh: 自動為每個子網域簽發憑證，不漏掉任何一個沒加密的角落。

text.en: Cloudflare renews certificates before they expire — no more 'certificate expired' outages.
text.zh: Cloudflare 會在憑證到期前自動更新 —— 不再有「憑證過期」害網站掛掉的慘劇。

text.en: A free certificate from Cloudflare to install on your server, valid for up to 15 years.
text.zh: Cloudflare 發的免費憑證，裝在你伺服器上，最長 15 年有效。

text.en: Flexible can cause redirect loops and leaves the Cloudflare→origin leg unencrypted. As soon as your server supports HTTPS, switch to Full (strict).
text.zh: Flexible 可能造成轉址無限迴圈，而且 Cloudflare→來源主機那段沒加密。只要伺服器支援 HTTPS，就趕快改成 Full (strict)。

en: Universal SSL is free on every Cloudflare plan, including Free.
Certificates auto-renew, so you never deal with expiry yourself.
Use the Origin CA certificate (free) to enable secure Full (strict) without buying anything.
Advanced certificates and uploading your own custom certificate are available on paid plans.
zh: Universal SSL 在每個 Cloudflare 方案（含免費版）都免費。
憑證自動續期，你完全不用管到期問題。
用免費的 Origin CA 憑證就能開啟安全的 Full (strict)，不必花錢買。
進階憑證與上傳你自己的自訂憑證，是付費方案的功能。
